details.author: Corsin Alig, Bernd Huf, Stephan Gieriet
details.description: The ASWStandard library is a utility library, comprising two sub-libraries: ASWGlobal, which defines commonly used constants (booleans, dialog return codes, timer values) for use across Hamilton SMT and MED applications, and TraceLevel, which provides a configurable tracing/logging framework with multiple verbosity levels (None, Release, Debug) and functions for tracing variables, arrays, sequences, and action states - enabling developers to embed structured diagnostic output into their liquid-handling instrument methods.
details.tags: constants, logging, tracing, diagnostics, debugging, utilities, enumerations, globals
details.library_file_names: ASWGlobal.hsl, ASWGlobal.ico, ASWGlobal.stp, TraceLevel.hsl, TraceLevel.ico, TraceLevel.stp, TraceLevel.chm
details.demo_file_names: TraceLevel Demo.hsl, TraceLevel Demo.med, TraceLevel Demo.stp

details.author: Corsin Alig, Bernd Huf, Stephan Gieriet
Corsin Alig, Bernd Huf, Stephan Gieriet
Corsin Alig, Bernd Huf, Stephan Gieriet
details.description: Provides configurable multi-level trace logging and diagnostic output for variables, arrays, sequences, and function execution flow to support method development, debugging, and validation on Hamilton liquid handling platforms.
details.tags: trace, logging, debug, diagnostics, method-development, validation, sequences, arrays, utilities
details.library_file_names: ASWGlobal.hsl, ASWGlobal.ico, ASWGlobal.stp, TraceLevel.chm, TraceLevel.hsl, TraceLevel.ico, TraceLevel.stp
details.demo_file_names: TraceLevel Demo.hsl, TraceLevel Demo.med, TraceLevel Demo.stp
